name: Signature Finance
description_short: Signature Finance is a Memphis-based installment lender offering small loans ($100–$1,050) with fast approval and monthly payment options for unexpected expenses.
description_long:
Signature Finance is a local lending company based in Memphis, Tennessee, operating since at least the early 2000s. The company is located at 1920 Madison Ave and has maintained the same phone number (901-726-1940) for years, suggesting stable local operations. They position themselves as a solution for consumers facing short-term cash shortages or unexpected financial emergencies.

The company offers installment loans ranging from $100 to $1,050, marketed as accessible alternatives to payday loans due to their emphasis on easy monthly payments rather than lump-sum repayment. They advertise fast approvals and the ability to apply by phone, removing friction from the application process. The company states they "accept all applications," suggesting minimal credit screening. They also mention a referral incentive program ("ask us how to earn $100"), though specifics are not provided on the website.

Signature Finance differentiates itself through local, phone-based service and a stated willingness to work with applicants regardless of credit history. The direct contact approach (phone and email) and physical storefront location in Memphis suggest a personal service model typical of community-based lenders. Their loan caps are relatively modest compared to personal loan lenders, positioning them squarely in the emergency-cash niche.

As a small-dollar lender, Signature Finance likely operates under Tennessee lending laws and charges interest rates and fees typical of this category. The website provides no transparency on APR, terms, or fee structures—a significant limitation for consumers evaluating cost. No online application portal is evident; all applications require phone contact. The company's age and local stability are positive indicators, but the complete absence of pricing information and limited digital presence may reflect their target demographic (consumers preferring phone-based service over online application).

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Loan amounts up to $1,050 available, higher than typical payday loans
Easy monthly installment payments instead of lump-sum repayment
Fast approval process advertised with same-day service potential
Apply by phone with no online application required for those who prefer personal contact
Accepts all applications regardless of credit history
Established local business in Memphis with long-standing phone number stability
Referral bonus program available ($100 incentive mentioned)
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website—complete pricing opacity
No online application option; phone-only application process may be inconvenient for digital-first consumers
Loan maximum of $1,050 is quite small for larger unexpected expenses
No information about term length, payment schedules, or repayment flexibility
Limited digital presence and no reviews, ratings, or third-party verification visible
best_for: Consumers in the Memphis, TN area needing $100–$1,000 for immediate expenses
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who prefer phone-based lending over digital platforms
People with poor or no credit history seeking accessible small-dollar loans
Borrowers who value local, in-person service over online lenders
diagnosis: Signature Finance is best suited for Memphis-area residents needing quick access to $100–$1,050 in cash with monthly repayment flexibility and minimal credit scrutiny. The critical caveat is complete lack of pricing transparency—borrowers must call to learn APR and fees, making cost comparison impossible before committing to an application.
services: Fast approval process (same-day or next-day implied)
Cash advance for short-term cash needs
In-person loan service at Memphis storefront
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
